root.long: sap-devs injects up-to-date SAP developer knowledge into your AI tools.
root.update_hint: ↻ sap-devs {{.TagName}} available — run 'sap-devs update' to install
inject.short: Push SAP context to your AI tools
inject.long:
Inject up-to-date SAP developer context into all detected AI tools.

Injects at global (user) scope by default into tools such as Claude Code,
Cursor, and GitHub Copilot. Use --project to opt into project scope and inject
into project-level files (CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, etc.) in the current directory.
inject.hint: Run 'sap-devs inject --dry-run' to preview changes before writing.
inject.uninstall.append_warning: warning: cannot auto-remove append-mode target {{.Path}} — remove manually
inject.status.no_results: No file-inject adapters found for the given scope/tool.
inject.status.append_warning: sap-devs warning: {{.Path}} uses append mode — injection state cannot be determined
sync.long: Syncs content from the official repo (and company repo if configured). Respects per-category TTLs unless --force is set.
sync.up_to_date: All content is up to date.
sync.warn_https: Warning: company_repo must be an HTTPS URL (got: {{.URL}}) — skipping sync.
tip.short: Print a SAP developer tip (add to your shell profile)
tip.no_tips: No tips available. Run 'sap-devs sync' to download content.

tip.install.no_profile: No shell profile found. Add this line to your shell profile manually:
tip.uninstall.not_found: 'sap-devs tip' was not found in any shell profile.

profile.show.short: Show your current profile and pack weights

profile.set.not_found: profile "{{.ID}}" not found — run 'sap-devs profile list' to see options

config.company.short: Configure the company content repo URL
config.token.short: Store a GitHub token for authenticating with github.tools.sap
config.token.long:
Store a Personal Access Token for authenticating with github.tools.sap.

Only required when syncing content from a private GitHub Enterprise instance
(github.tools.sap). Not needed if you are outside the SAP network or already
have GITHUB_TOOLS_SAP_TOKEN set in your environment.

The token is stored in the OS keychain (macOS Keychain, Windows Credential
Manager, Linux Secret Service). On systems without a keychain, it falls back
to a credentials file with restricted permissions.
config.token.delete_with_value: cannot use --delete with a token value
config.token.warn_history: Warning: token passed as argument may be saved in shell history.
config.token.history_hint: Consider using 'sap-devs config token' without arguments for interactive entry.
config.token.prompt: Enter GitHub token (input hidden, will not appear in shell history):
config.token.interactive_unavailable: interactive input not available — pass token as argument: sap-devs config token <value>
config.location.short: Store your location for event and recommendation filtering
config.location.detect_with_value: cannot use --detect with a location value
config.location.detect_notice: Note: auto-detect uses IP geolocation (approximate). No GPS or OS location permissions are used.
config.tip_rotation.long:
Set how often the tip changes. Modes: daily (default), hourly, session.

Note: session uses an hourly seed — multiple terminals opened within the same hour show the same tip.
config.tip_rotation.invalid: Invalid rotation mode "{{.Mode}}": must be daily, hourly, or session
init.step4_location_body:
Your location is used for event filtering and recommendations.
  Enter city and country (e.g. "Hamburg, Germany"), type "detect" to
  auto-detect from your IP address, or press Enter to skip:

update.done: ✓ Updated to {{.TagName}}. Restart your shell if needed.
init.welcome: Welcome to sap-devs — your AI-first SAP developer toolkit.
init.step1_body:
sap-devs syncs content from github.tools.sap, which requires a Personal
  Access Token if you are inside the SAP corporate network. If you are
  outside SAP or already have GITHUB_TOOLS_SAP_TOKEN set in your
  environment, press Enter to skip.
init.step1_no_tty: Note: interactive token input unavailable. Run 'sap-devs config token <value>' after setup to authenticate.
init.step2_warn_failed: Warning: content sync failed ({{.Err}}). Continuing with any cached content.
init.step3_header: Step 3/6: What kind of SAP developer are you?
init.step3_prompt: Enter number (or press Enter to skip):
init.step3_no_profiles: No profiles found. Run 'sap-devs sync' then 'sap-devs profile list'.
init.step5_header: Step 5/6: Inject SAP context into your AI tools?
init.step5_body: This writes SAP developer context to your AI tool configuration files.
init.step5_warn_failed: Warning: inject failed ({{.Err}}). You can run 'sap-devs inject' manually.
init.step5_done: SAP context injected into your AI tools.
init.step6_header: Step 6/6: Add SAP tip to your terminal startup?
init.step6_body: This adds 'sap-devs tip' to your shell profile so you see a tip each time you open a terminal.
init.step6_no_profile:
Could not add hook: no shell profile found.
  Add 'sap-devs tip' to your shell profile manually.
init.step6_warn_partial: Warning: some profiles could not be updated ({{.Err}}).
init.step6_restart: Restart your terminal to see your first tip.
init.step6_already_present: Hook already present in your shell profile(s).
init.complete: Setup complete! Run 'sap-devs --help' to explore all commands.
init.complete_hint: Run 'sap-devs inject' to re-inject after syncing new content.
